name: bloodkings-status-frontend-deps
description: apps/status has no build step - it's plain PHP deployed as-is via FTP. This manifest exists only so Dependabot can see and version-bump the frontend libraries that are actually loaded via pinned CDN URLs. The URLs themselves live in ONE place - the BK_CDN_* constants at the top of functions.php - not scattered across templates. There is no npm install here and no node_modules gets deployed. When Dependabot opens a bump PR, update the matching BK_CDN_* constant in functions.php to match (echarts is intentionally held at 5.x - see the comment above the constants for why).
